input.command:
for file in ./src/parser/c_lang.rs ./src/parser/ruby.rs ./src/parser/cpp.rs ./src/parser/typescript.rs ./src/parser/java.rs ./src/parser/rust_lang.rs ./src/parser/javascript.rs ./src/parser/go.rs ./src/parser/python.rs ./src/parser/csharp.rs; do
  echo "=== $file ==="
  grep -n "fn find_sym" "$file" | head -1
done
